creator: alex@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-ports->obrien

David is the maintainer of tcsh in the base system. 
Since this patch could also be interesting for the tree (though it's contrib/) 
David should decide what should happen with this. 

David, if you think it is a good idea to have this option, do the 
required steps, please.
